stemHtml: If the number of pulse pairs received by the DME-transponder exceeds the maximum number possible, which aircraft will always be denied a DME-range first?

options.a: The aircraft at the largest distance from the DME-station.
options.b: The aircraft at the lowest altitude.
options.c: The aircraft from which the weakest pulse pairs are received.
options.d: The smallest aircraft which is using the DME-station for range measurement.
